9.anchor: But even the archangel Michael, when he was disputing with the devil about the body of Moses, did not himself dare to condemn him for slander but said, “The Lord rebuke you!”
9.note: Jude is alluding to the Jewish Testament of Moses (approximately the first century a.d.

15.anchor: to judge everyone, and to convict all of them of all the ungodly acts they have committed in their ungodliness, and of all the defiant words ungodly sinners have spoken against him.”

23.anchor: save others by snatching them from the fire; to others show mercy, mixed with fear—hating even the clothing stained by corrupted flesh.
23.note: The Greek manuscripts of these verses vary at several points.
